seoTitle: Mapoon vs Maramie — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mapoon and Maramie. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mapoon and Maramie.
heading: Mapoon vs Maramie — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mapoon, Queensland and Maramie, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Maramie has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Mapoon (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mapoon or Maramie safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mapoon has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Maramie scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mapoon scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Maramie scores 37/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mapoon or Maramie?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Maramie has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
